div.span:
Commit Exchange
Dragonfly Handshake
(EC-DH Key Agreement)

Derive PMK from:
• Passphrase
• Both MAC Addresses
• Random Values

Confirm Exchange
Mutual Authentication
with Zero-Knowledge Proof

Derive PTK & GTK
Forward Secrecy Enabled

✅ Security: Each session uses unique
keys. Offline attacks impossible.
Forward secrecy protects past sessions.

Message 2: Client → AP
SNonce + MIC
(Derive PTK from PMK)

Message 3: AP → Client
GTK + MIC
(Group Temporal Key)

⚠️ Vulnerability: Handshake can be
captured and used for offline
dictionary/brute-force attacks
